body:
This PR adds a first ClimaOcean model.

Near-term todo:
- [ ] Consolidate three remappers into one single remapper
- [ ] Use in-place remapping instead of `interpolate`
- [ ] Remap directly onto halos instead of filling them
- [ ] Reduce allocations
- [ ] Check if sign of salinity flux is correct
- [ ] Use a better albedo model
- [ ] Add support for checkpoints
- [ ] Add more and better diagnostics
- [ ] Clean up make_ocean_diagnostics_plots
- [ ] Investigate maximum timestep

A little further in the future
- [ ] Support TripolarGrid
- [ ] Add support to regridding with MPI
- [ ] Use correct SurfaceFluxes for ocean
- [ ] Add conservation tests
- [ ] Spun-up ocean

In the future
- [ ] Penetrating SW
title: Add first ocean model

body: The `water_albedo_from_atmos` callback sets the water albedo in our slab ocean. The reason this is done as a callback is probably an historical artifact: the natural place where this should be done is as part of the evolution the ocean model.
title: Move water_albedo_from_atmos to be a step
